star_1.text: This is not an idle game, this is a straight pay to win platform. It's fun at first, but then you hit a hard RNG wall that could take you months or years to get over. The amount of resources you get, gold and gems, is pathetic. At mid game I was maybe getting 3-4 million gold a day, at that level, that's not even enough to get one evolve on a 6 star rare! This game is designed to make you pay, it's a trap. I dont care how much you like dragons, this is not an idle & merge game.

It was fun at first but, while yes "technically" you can progress without paying, the games heavily leans on you to spend money to get better and when I mean heavily, there is less pressure in a pressure cooker then there is in this game coaxing you to spend money. Then *if* you decide to spend money, the prices for the mobile game are absurdly hot garbage. They want $24.99 for a monthly pass and on top of that they have two different types of season passes for $24.99 each. Do not play.

This game was amazing for almost 3 years. The server error that the developers caused, was incorrectly handled. Now game errors after the server resets persist, and they are devastating. Can't collect essence, can't swap binds, can't complete weekly tasks. Example: after digging out of a -139,000 gem deficit, I celebrated by changing my name for 750 gems out of 3,400. Now I'm -10346 gems. Uninstalling and reinstalling didn't help. There's a better post by someone else below.

Pre-registered for this game a long time ago and just got the notification this week... The game already had people at max level that had been playing since 2019 so I'm so far behind there's no reason to bother competing. What a waste. Also the ads never work, it always says that ads cannot be found which ruins any benefit i would've had, making it necessary to pay money.

Pay to play!!! I was really enjoying this game. Now you've jumped on the season pass reward scheme like all other games now you have to ditch loot boxes. The issue is you're charging £24.99 for a month!!! Its completely ridiculous. Even the big title games that are out there on consoles only charge around £10 and that season last for a couple of months. How you believe it's right to charge that much for that little of time is a complete joke!!

I really, really enjoyed this game. You could get everything you needed to progress and didn't mind paying the odd pound or two to advance. But now, just like every other mobile game, they've become greedy. Now you need to buy "passes" to get anywhere. No thanks. When will app developers realise people don't want to subscribe to a mobile game! I wouldn't subscribe to a console game, let alone mobile!! Its a shame because this one had me hooked big time. Guess I'll go look elsewhere.

My rating went from 5 to 1 star with the last update: a cute, entertaining, somewhat unique concept turned into a money pit overnight. No proper communication with the playerbase, expensive content that's not worth the money and now literally everything can be purchased for the right price. It's mainly a solo game, the minimal PvP and lacking team interactions after two months are saddening. It's nothing more than wallet wars (30 hits/day) They collected suggestions and feedback on various channels, and only implemented those that gain money, neglecting free players and enthusiasts.

This game seemed fun at first but then I realized how expensive it is It's not worth it. Plus the game crashes a lot. I play other games and they don't crash or freeze up. At this point this game is a waste of space on my phone so to say goodbye. Maybe change your prices and fix the crashing. That's all. 🤷🏻‍♀️

This game is beautiful that's all it has for it. There's no point to play it it is just the same thing over and over and over with no difference besides the dragons. And it is an absolutely overpriced money sink. The developers made a gorgeous game but what's the point of playing it. The story is weak. And the backgrounds are basic. And they are cheap with Rewards unless you buy them.

It is generally fun but it is becoming very pay to win with each new update. There is a suggestion channel at the game's discord app with very good input and suggestions but the devs instead choose to completely ignore them and instead think up of ways to money grab. If they keep this up, they are going to alienate most of the players. New players beware. You have no hope now of ever catching up unless you spend hundreds of dollars.

Well just installed the game. I'm really disappointed. It says network Instable and trying to reconnect. I clicked okay and it keeps repeating the same thing. My data and my Wi-Fi are top notch. So I know it's not on my end. For a game that is just released. You should not have these issues. I really wanted to check this game out. I am not going to uninstall the game just yet. I am going to wait and see if y'all fix the issue. Thank you for your time I hope it gets fixed soon.

After reading the ratings I thought maybe the game wasn't worth it. But, after a ridiculously long download, I finally got my hands on it. The loading is as long as the download and the game crashed after I've only played it for a few minutes which forced me to wait at the loading screen once again. The game was going as what devs planned after all that had passed. But, when I came back the next day, the loading kept freezing and wouldn't get into the game. Please fix this.

So I stopped playing this game for some reason about a year ago, I come back to it, I load my data, and it's stuck in a boot loop… I've tried uninstalling and then reinstalling and the problem is still there, it keeps saying there was a problem loading purchases but I didn't buy anything, hopefully my game data didn't get deleted in the process, but anyways, unplayable

Doesn't even work. All I got was an eternal black screen. I tried restarting, leaving it there for a while to see if it was just taking long to load and clearing cache but nothing, didn't work at all. Next time make sure your game even works before releasing it. Thanks for wasting my time.

So i enjoy the game. But i would really enjoy to not lose my progress in the game every time i open the app. It is extremely frustrating to get far on it then the next day i log back on all that progress is gone. And i did do in game purchases so that is even more frustrating that i can't get any of what i had paid for back.

No multi control on dragons. Short irrelevant story line & soon to hit pay wall to advance. Can't beat the game if you don't have more and better dragons...in come app purchases. Last note: monthly package is 23 Euro's. In Malta where I currently reside, my phone prepaid package is 15 Euro's a month. It's more then I pay for my Netflix and Amazon Video subscriptions. Laughable for an Idle game for such high expectations. Pass.

Used to love this game so much; now it's clear it's just one big cash grab! Not only the amount of seals needed to buy mythic dragons is raised, it's also impossible to get that much with the new event! You need a crazy amount of gem/cash to get more seals, otherwise the only way to get lotsa seals is by converting A MYTHIC you've worked so hard to evolve, just to buy ANOTHER MYTHIC (wth)! If you can't make good contents, don't make it impossible for players to progress just to keep ppl playing

Developers are the worst. Constant bugs and insanely slow fix times. They are definitely just trying to get as much money as possible whole killing the game. They also never ever listen to player feedback. They just do what they want, release content no one wants and continue to ignore the uproar. It's all very sad since it would be a great game if they would just listen to the players and not release bug filled updates every month.

Current Rating until I can actually play it. I expected more from a Com2US game, especially after playing Summoner's War for years, but I cant even get past the initial load screen without it telling me it failed to access servers, and im on an extremely good connection.

This is atrocious! Interface has been changed twice in 3 months, from bad to worse! The legendary rates are plain horrible! Been a week since I've seen some legendary dragon. I fused hundreds of tier 10s and tens of shiny dragons, all in vain. Not even mystic epic dragons anymore. Just plain useless ones. Also, got 2 legendary dragons a week ago and a few hours later, one of them has disappeared. I've been paying monthly, but, that will stop. I will not be wasting any more money on this game, because, it is truly a waste. I will invest in another game. You guys can ignore this review, or you can take it for the truth. I've been playing this game for 4 months, so, I do have an idea of what I'm talking about.

star_2.text: I played this game way longer than I should have. I like dragons. And this game has good visuals, as well as consistent rewards and checkpoints that make you feel like you're still progressing. I liked the game. But it's a pay to win. Progression is SOOO slow, and you can't catch up without spending hundreds of real dollars. I cant afford a $25 purchase for a single legendary dragon. If I want to pay that much for a game, I'll buy something bigger that I can own after paying for it.

I enjoyed the game for a while, but it's exactly what the others said. It crashes. Like, a l o t. I only able to play for, maybe 20 mins or longer as an hour at the best. Changing the graphic to low and turning off options doesn't help with the crashes. It'll crash no matter what. It might have something to do with a server or a game, but I guess devs won't bother to fix that problem since it seems this have been around longer than a month. 2/5 from me.

It's a good idea but the execution is not good. 1. I like the idea of merging dragons, but I did not see any real engaging gameplay. The dragons just kind of sit there and shoot enemies. It's not like a real bullet hell where I needed to dodge shots or anything. 2. I would suggest making all the dragons follow a single dragon (like form a line) so you can dodge bullets better because right now, you can only move one dragon at a time, so there's no real point in dodging bullets.

This game was fun for the first little bit. The dragons were pretty cool. They sell you the autoplay for a month at a greatly reduced price. The low rating is because while the game was briefly entertaining it quickly loses it's charm once you burn through that reduced price month. Without auto play the game is tedious and slow. The regular price of the auto play and the other monthly packs is costly for this type of game.

Idle doesn't begin to describe how boring this game was. I like Com2us, so l wanted to give it a shot, but there is little to no skill or strategy needed, and the "fusion" is basically a different flavor gatcha. They are fair in how they trickle out shiny dragons to merge premium units, but fusion is completely random and that's not fun.

It's a fun game but it gives off the feeling that the developers are trying to rip you off. Ads almost never works on the first try. You have to press tens of times before it gives you an ad, I suspect that it's because they want you to shell out gems or money. The in game purchases are very expensive and there is an expensive paywall, I mean do you seriously expect people to pay 75$ monthly to play a mostly idle, mobile game? This is just a tip of the iceberg.

I pre-registered for this game because it looked absolutely amazing and the music shown so far is great but the game is currently unplayable because of server issues causing instability. I'll keep watching the game in hopes of you guys addressing this issue so that we the players can actually play and help work out any bugs in the game to improve everyone's experience.

Fix the log in already!! It's been 2 days that I've been getting am error message while trying to login, that says the server is instable? Should be unstable but who cares because I can't log in. I've emailed the tech support email with a picture. I've re-installed the app, reset my wifi etc. Nothing is working. Please fix this. Would be a solid 5 star game otherwise.

**Update** played for about 3 months and deleted the game because it is literally the same thing over and over. PVP is almost non-existent aside from Auto battles against random people. The game is 90% PVE and has gotten so boring that i have stopped playing. Also, I didn't spend anything and still got good dragons (legends) to 6*. So playing for free is doable and isn't hindered. However, that's not the issue, it would be 5 stars but it is just soooo boring, doing the same thing for months.

I only gave 2 stars for now because I think it's a cool game. If the game itself is like the ones I see from the ads and promos then I'm definitely sure that I will like it. But a problem arose when I downloaded it. When I clicked the application the screen became all black. It tried to wait for it to respond but after 30 minutes it was still black. I tried uninstalling it and installing it again but nothing seems to work. I hope this "bug" or problem can be fixed soon <3

First look at the shops shows obvious p2w elements (Most items in shops REQUIRE GEMS and you get a 7th dragon slot ONLY if you buy the monthly $$ package for ONLY $25... Not to mention the monthly package gives permanent autoplay plus more than twice the dragon eggs than normal. What the ****). Besides that, only been playing a day and I already find myself needing more gems. I'm afraid that the power gap will be too large between paying and non-paying players. Too many red flags for me, sorry.

Used to love this game so much. Now theyve brought in a battle pass and dragon pass that are not only horrible and stingy with rewards to the point that its not worth the time but if you want more you have to pay nearly $30 for just one of the passes, $60 if you want both. And even if you pay that money the rewards really arent worth the money. The devs need to get rid of the passes and bring back the event chest, least you could get somewhere with that. Horrible game and would not recommend

[THE GAMES A FAT RIP OFF] [DONT RECOMMEND] The games alright. Id rate it higher but i dont really like the graphics. And some of the dragons just dont look eye catching to me. And why does the battle pass cost 25 USD? Thats a bit pricey don't you think? After viewing a couple of other reviews i realized the developers are trying to rip you off. The adds are practically unavailable so you have to spend your gems no matter what, and everything that includes "gems" are extremly pricey.

It seems like a good game from otger reviews but i am unable to enter the game because "server conection instable" even though i am directly next to WIFI connection. I might be dumb and it's with service, but i don't think that has anything to do with it when i have an assured WIFI connection. 2 bars fyi. If it is the connection, the servers need to be expanded so that everyone can play.

Well this game isn't bad there's just a number of things that make the game annoying. First the fact that you stuck with a 2500 daily hatch limit which of course you can bypass with a $25 monthly pass but of course they also want you to get the other 2 $25 passes they offer. So yeah its one of those if you spend money you'll have a much easier time and if not well get ready for a slow up hill climb. Honestly its not a bad game devs just need to stop playing follow the leader with IAP's

My favorite Idle game, doesn't require paying money to enjoy. Doesn't even tempt you to need it, you have the option to watch ads for a lot of things and you get gems from a lot of sources as well. Once you start spending money on this your success rate in fusion drops about 99%. I get it, I bought auto play so I'm fusing like 75% more, but I mean wow.

What is going on with your servers? Login takes forever now or sometimes not at all. Playing in the game, i get kicked and when I finally get back in, it's like i wasn't playing on there before. Plus daily boss isn't accessible, kept waiting on a black screen forever. This is the first time I had issues with this game.

You guys made a fantastic game. Even though it was free to play, players used to buy some of your items as a way of saying thank you. But you guys just ruined it with your latest FORTNITE like pass system. The game doesn't feel the same anymore. It is now clearly pay to win. You guys will loose your most loyal and long time players soon if this is how it is going to be.

It's ok. Preregistered last year and once it came out, it's just meh. The dragons are neat and all and it's an idle game but there's really nothing special about it. The biggest downside by stage 280 it gets weirdly difficult. I have 2 epic dragons and 3 rare and wasted all my gold leveling them but they complete maybe 1 or 2 stages before they get taken out. I'd figure that would happen past stage 500 or something. Overall it's just ok, could have been better, not worth the wait.

An amusing game that is unfortunately marred by its tendency to freeze up during play, especially when watching ads for in-game boosts. I typically experience 10-15 freezes per day, necessitating either watching an extra ad after restarting, or else spending in-game currency to buy the power-up instead. The lack of game stability detracts greatly from the fun.

star_3.text: I've reached level 271 in the game, and have put in plenty of time into this game. Pros: -Some fun dragon designs -great way to kill time -unique format for an idle game -generally pretty generous for the currency, doesn't feel like you HAVE to pay for stuff to continue, though I still did. Cons: -If you want to watch an ad to get free things, you generally have to jam on the button multiple times until it does something. Once you do this the first time of loading up the game, you generally don't have to do this again until next load. -I've had rewards get "Stuck" and you can't collect them, leaving a notification stuck there, which is annoying -there's seasons for a set of rewards, there's "Dragon Pass" and "Battle Pass", I got through the rewards for Battle Pass, saw that you could renew it, saved up enough gems, but had about half the points for the next round of the pass. when i renewed the pass, the points went away and I had to start over. This is probably the most negative experience I've had in the game. Why didn't my points carry over?

The server could not connect with my phone and it tried reconnecting each time. EDIT: So the developer fixed the troubleshoot problem i believe as the game worked after reinstall. The game is ok as it does take away a few hours of boredom. To be honest, its like playing the spaceship shooting game where you are suppose to shoot incoming aliens as the spaceship is moving straight through space. Because the game follows the same routine, it starts getting boring IMO. If you know, you know!

Coulda been 5 stars. I love the game. It's super expensive but I still love the game. The problem I have is when I can't afford 30 bux a month and I want to start using the ads to fuel my game for a few days. That's when 99% of the ads crash the whole game. It sucks. A few times it the restart had me with a lost normally dragon or a few lost merges or a few reward collections uncollected. It's frustrating! And it's such a beautiful and relaxing game. Fix it please.

It's a fun game and I really enjoy it. However, for the in game money, it's a little over-the-top spending. $20+ packs. These packs arent even worth it, one legendary dragon, 1 million gold and some soul stones that you can make easily just by waiting. Who would want to spend $20+ dollars just as same as waiting.

Been playing the game for about 10 months, and it's a pretty good idle game. But with each update, the game just gets slower and slower, they keep making everything shinier but don't care about the performance. It got to a point where I feel like most of the things are a chore so I sometimes just ignore it. And that's almost all I feel through the updates, very little new gameplay and if they add anything it just feels broken forever (unbalanced, literal bugs etc.). It's a real shame, I do enjoy the core game a lot.

Overall a pretty and easy afk that has ads to help auto farm your game. There are a few heavily pricey things to talk about though. First of the 24.99 battle passes which follow the typical free pass pay pass. (There is 2 both 25 bucks and no deal for both) on top of that the auto play for a month and all 4 of the level up bonuses are also $25. Which is grate if you're trying to desway people from spending money. As someone who also plays summoners war (also made by come2us) I'm disappointed.

Graphically amazing game, but shortly after logging in and merging what you can and a few upgraded things here and there you're back to waiting for progress from idle play. I feel like to many potentially great idle and timed resource games fall to this. As a players wait in game extends time in game decreases, and then eventually you forget to even play the game.

Failed to watch ad. The sheer number of times this happens a day is beyond ridiculous and the main reason I took 2 stars off. With the word "Idle" in the title assumed it'd do most of your playing for you while you were offline. Not true. There is very little progress to be made while offline. You can still set yourself up if you're not always able to be on. This game is clearly whale bait and that's okay. You can still play and have fun. My favorite thing about this game is strategically picking the dragons for your team.

This went from a 5 star playable game to a 3. I'd go lower but it's all due to a new issue not the actual game. The game is a 5 to me cause I don't buy in game stuff. And works how I like it. But this new problem is when I'm collecting my daily reward. It's doubling and tripling my rewards, but as I try to get to the actual game the rewards keep coming; and not stopping; but then all of a sudden you get hit with a "game loading" issue. Then it restarts the game, you do the same thing over again.

Review after 2 months:Beautiful game with flawed rewards. As most of the other reviews have said, it is a very nice game to look at. Gameplay is fine, getting through the daily chores is fairly quick. The greatest downfall by far is the rewards, if there isn't an event going on to double or triple the currency gained it's pretty difficult to progress. Especially the pass system, 3 points for an elite dragon, you'll need to fuse 1000 times to receive all the rewards, that's 2000 black dragons.

An interesting take on your tiered fusion game. sadly, once you reach some few thousand hatches they lower it to a crawl (even with hatch boosters on) and try to get you to pay to get the normal rate back. That's the one thing I disagree with strongly. the rest of the game is your bog standard grind. The little story it has is basically meaningless to you. it's all about numbers. increase yours to beat more.

I'm actually good with the gane for the most part, but so far the gameplay seems bland and not exactly that deep. It's just seeing your dragons fly endlessly, hatching eggs that somehow produce adult dragons, and try to play a different kind of (free) loot box where you can try to get epics or legendaries (good thing they're not limited time). The really critical complaint I have is that I tried converting dragons and for some reason I can't add dragons to convert. You might want to check this.

The gameplay is easy to understand and get into. However, it's pretty p2w from what i've seen so far. The monthly package of this game is about 4 times as much as other games and it offers auto function that makes the game easy as hell & would make your progression way ahead of others. However if you're not competitive, the game is quite an enjoyable bullet-hell type (which is a tad bit too easy imo, you don't really need to dodge).

Love it so far but there is no in game chat option unless you are in a legion. Makes it impossible to talk to other players, I am top 50 in every type of map and very active but cant even get in to any of the top 25 legions because there is no option to chat. If this is added its 5 star game for sure but that sorta ruins the experience for someone competitive

General design is fine, but two main issues for me. 1. Watching advertisements for rewards is broken half the time, having "no ads available". 2. Log in bonus is time limited to 2 hours after daily reset, meaning you don't get any if you can't log on in time.

Was a really fun game. Starting to feel the burnout. You have to spend money to really get anywhere, and the packages are A LOT of money! Plus the grind of doing the exact same thing every day to improve is getting boring. Yes it's an idle game, but the GRIND! Once my monthly pass runs out, I'm done.

Game = Looks Good, Is Addicting, Well optimized. But.... it is also expensive. You want player to drop $40-75 per month on exclusive content? That is ridiculous. I am a premium player, i have played every day since NA release.... and it is very expensive. Because of my premium purchase, i am in the top 5-10% but without it, i wouldnt be able to compete. Please lower monthly/seasonal pass costs. Thanks

PAY TO WIN ALERT!! Do not even let the free players have the privilege of having a normal hatching time without limit. If you are a free player, you will have a hard time to get stronger in this game, unless you dedicate every seconds of your time here. Sucks. Fyi, I paid real cash on this game. **EDIT** I actually enjoyed the game, I managed to play until I am level 150, it's just that, you will eventually feel that there's something wrong. There's nothing new to the game.

Good game, but when i got something from the store, it destroyed my game, couldn't log in, im currently having to uninstall and reinstall the issue is so bad. Pls deal with this game destroying bug i most likely lost all my progress Edit: Google accounts saved my progress and the game is mostly back on track, but still, PLEASE figure out what is causing this error. I do apologize if i was rude in any form.

It was way too slow to function even with all the settings turned down. It stinks because I lived it while I could, but a game taking 2-3 minutes to load each time was a bit much. (I did basic troubleshooting... It just wouldn't load) normally, I would 1 star something like that, but I really did love the game for the time I could play it.

star_4.text: I love this game! The only one I have on my phone I ever really play anymore. Only thing I hate and wish was different- there are to many 'pay for play upgrade' options that are not available to those who cannot afford to spend real $$. The prices are astronomical and seem insane to me. Wish they offered options to purchase the same items/packages with gems or dragon coins so that everyone had a fair chance at success and moving forward in the game. Think it gives unfair advantages.

This is an enjoyable game, but as usual the price of packages is EXCESSIVE. The first time you obtain any given legendary dragon it will offer to allow you to buy another copy for $25 (including some easy to obtain items), later it will randomly offer you more copies for $42 (including some easy to obtain items). You will need 48 copies of each legendary dragon so if you do the math they value these fully upgraded dragons around $2000 a piece and there 26 legendary dragons. The only redeeming feature is that the in-game currency, gems, are obtainable in game and there are actually some decent sales where you can obtain a chance at getting legendary dragons. Aside from that the game is more of an idle game (especially if you purchase auto play) which encourages you to leave it running for long periods of time to get the most out of everyday. The problem is it is a HUGE battery waster and was using around 13% of my battery per hour even in "hibernation mode".

Edit: Spent more time playing it. My initial excitement for the game has been tempered a little. It's still fun and I'll keep playing, but in all seriousness its an "idle" game. Don't play this expecting some crazy deep game play. Also its free so don't go expecting the game to give you everything without paying nothing, if not time then money. Keep your expectations real and have fun :)! Its a good idle phone game, its great for quick simple fun with a little added depth and it has dragons!

After playing it since October 2020. I can say that having minimal ads is a plus. The animations are very good. I don't like the fact that it's feels very grindy and at times very repetitive. And I do find that there is certainly a lack of a story despite the interesting descriptions of the dragons. When you start the game there was a story that existed and suddenly went away. I do recommend the devs to add more story elements to the game.

Very much a merge game. If you're into that, this one seems good. Good tutorial that explains what you need without too wordy descriptions, and the merge mechanics are simple to understand and smooth. You can reposition the dragons, which is cool. Honestly, I got so into merging, I forgot the dragons are technically battling. Seems fun, but I don't have a lot of phone space, so I'm deleting it. But would recommend for those that like merge games.

Auto-Play is behind a paid wall. Ads sometimes don't work but usually do. Some positive things about the game revolve mainly around settings, smooth gameplay and great visuals. Also lots of dragons OwO!! There is some kind of monthly "Battle Pass", hard to progress through :/ other aspects are confusing but there are tips if you select the question mark :P

Amazing Idle game, but expensive! Arguably the best idle RPG I've played. Graphics are solid, gameplay and strategy are great, etc. The only problem is the insanely high prices! If you want no adds and free auto play, prepare to pay $25 a month! I could understand a one time fee of $25, but every month?! The battle passes are worse at $30 each. Thankfully the game itself is fun to play. F2P is ok for most of the game, but endgame definitely caters to the "whales" who spend money.

This is an awesome game with fantastic graphics! The game play is easy to learn and use. I like that the dragons look lifelike versus other games where the dragons look more like a cartoon. I only gave 4 stars because you can't use a dragon's special weapon until a certain criteria has been reached in the game, which I haven't been able to reach yet.

Very fun idle game! I come back every day to check, and improve my stuff. Then turn it off, and come back later. Love all the new dragons they are adding, and skins! But seems my ad watcher will turn off, and on. One moment I can watch an add for boss battle or auto play. Then it turns off, and I can't watch anything for a few days! Not sure if a bug, or if trying to get me to spend gems! lastly they only give all the attention to legendary dragons. Wish rares, and epics got stuff too.

So far I'm really enjoying the game! I've bought a pack by choice but you actually receive a lot of free stuff to help you out which is really nice considering some games don't offer as much! The only thing I'm having an issue with currently is that when I try to convert dragons into soul stones it's only allowing me to pick certain ones. Is that how the game is meant to be? I've searched and found nothing on this; hope it will be fixed soon!

Edit: total rewrite of this review. My previous review focused a lot on the cost of gem, dragon, and coin bundles. However, after a couple of months in, I see that there is plenty of in game currency and dragons to merge and grow available through gameplay. On the surface, it looks like a Galaga style shooter, however, the focus is on merging and upgrading your dragons with some manual play. I actually really like the auto-play, instead focus on dragon management, which is the core of the game

Well I like this game it looks great the graphics are really good the designs for some of the "dragons" are debatable but pretty good and each one feels unique though I do have a few problems with this game there is a really weird curve of progression and a lack of things to do once you get good dragons and the "battlepass" is EXTREMELY expensive for a game like this like there isn't even much to do and you want like $40 for both but regardless I hope this game can overcome these issues.

nifty game, the dragons are cool and it's very rewarding to leave the game running while you go do something else. the load times are kinda ridiculous though. I have a fairly fast phone but still it pauses the entire game and takes 20-30 seconds to load every so often. sometimes it gets stuck in loading loops and I can't do anything except close the app

just managed to connect (was a big issue but it resolved itself over time) it's a little game where you arcade shoot with dragons on screen that you can combine to make better dragons. it's relaxing. so far not as money hungry as I was expecting which is a big plus. the game while fun feels like it is lacking *something* I can't put my finger on it. there are moments of lul where your waiting on the next egg (4 dev: maybe more to do while you are playing would be a good implementation)

This is a good idle game with an easy tap and merge gameplay you can stop in and do for any amount of time. It is fairly generous and free to play friendly, although pay to play will advance much more quickly. I don't like the frequent loading pauses interrupting my merges. And the game offers to show you ads then says it doesn't have an ad to show you. Because you need to watch a lot of ads, this gets old pretty quick.

the game is amazing considering it's brand new. the designs are a "better than decent", I do think they could use some work. and the servers are pretty laggy it also does take some time to actually get in the game. I also don't really like the time it takes to recharge the dragon and essence tickets and the daily boss as well. without these problems it would be a total 5 star. I'm glad I pre-registered for this game. consider downloading this game for the players that read this!

This is a pretty decent game the tutorial is not very long at all so it allows you to pretty much get right into gameplay the dragons look really nice and you can advance fairly quickly and another great note is that they do not push ads in your face all the time which is just something that I find extremely annoying there are some things that can be better explained like for example I still don't understand how I'm supposed to add weapons onto the dragons but other then that it is good

Game is very easy understand, graphics and sound direction are decent. But the P2W aspects of the game are too blatant. Plus, the game charges too much for the packages. Wish they could lower to prices for both regular dolphin players as well as make it easier for F2P players to work towards building their 7* dragons. The rate for getting the dragons is fine, but there are too many things still locked behind a wall, especially for F2P players, such as the soul stones and star seals. 🐬

I really like the game! It's not easy for me to stick with games but this one is very addicting. There are a few things I don't like-but I think that's only because the developers are still working on the game- for example, it would be nice if I could tap and move more than one dragon during battle! And it would also be nice if the evolved dragons changed a little bit to look cooler, like if they got bigger or their fins changed color. But as I said, the developers are still working on updates!

Game take on the merge game in a different way, graphic and gameplay is interesting enough. I usually will pay for game if i like it but the options here is too expensive for what i get in return. The monthly pack should be cheaper and reduce reward to make it more attractive, people will likely to pay about under $10/mth than $40.

star_5.text: Updating from 4 to 5. I keep coming back to this game because the idle formula is actually really good. I mean for what it is it's just really well balanced in all aspects, and it's not super bloated like these games tend to be. The UI could be improved by labeling dragons in the menu where you see them all (even not owned) & linking store items to their previews (like appearances to dragons). Buying auto play seems essential, it's discounted the 1st time but otherwise quite expensive.

Love the game! Easiest idling game I have ever played. Only thing I would like is to not have the rankings show when I go to fight the boss or receive the level up rewards. It's a bother when having to wait for it to load the list. If you could place it in its own window I would be very grateful. Also, a larger supply of ads to watch would be nice cuz it doesn't always have an ad to play which is annoying after a while.

So far I'm loving the game. Great graphics. Not to hard to figure it out how to play it. Not bad..but the only down fall I didn't like it interrupts(blue screen/buffing) now and then I guess when I level up stages. One question for the game...is there a pause button?? Because there is time I'm receiving things or trying to buff my dragons or need to stop to do something but I don't want to close out the game so is there a pause button anywhere in the game??

Review #2: after successfully logging in to the server, you're immediately greeted by a beautiful scene with awesome looking dragons!! You start merging and progressing almost instantaneously, they give you quite a lot of free stuff to continue progression and there's tons of gameplay to explore! Well worth the download, you, yes you reading this, should totally give it a try if you like dragons, idle games and merge games 😁

FIRST: If it says no ads, just keep hitting the ad button! The server must be busy but I PROMISE YOU there are ads. Not a bad idle/merge game with some nice strategies and fantastic graphics. It's VERY GIVING to its F2P users! Just grind it out for a few days and see for yourself. My only complaints are that moving all 6 dragons around individually for bosses is a pain in the butt and that the growth packs and subscriptions are way too expensive.

I love everything about this, but quick question: where can I find the loading screen music because I absolutely adore that and would like to know how to find it since it gives off such a calming energy. So that is what I would love to know. And by loading screen music, I mean the music that plays before you hit start. But otherwise, everthing is beautiful, simple, fun, and yet challenging, but I believe that there should be more than just chatting to do with your legions. That would be great.

I am unable to load the game. All I have is a black screen aftet lauching the app. First impression does not last. I may had poor connection during the first several attempts. But it went smoothly the next day. Now I'm an active regular player. You can probably add "experience points" as an additional way to level up dragons in the battle field. This way you can engage the player more. ☺

This game is a fun, addictive blend of idle clicker, collecting, merge, boss battles and leveling. I am excited to unlock more features, and see what's to come with future updates. The dragon designs are wonderful, too. I am still trying to get a grasp on the Legion feature and would appreciate more instructions, but considering the english player base is a minority, I don't expect too much there.

Great game love dragons and this really satisfies my want but the imbalance of dragons between the elements bugs my OCD. Can one more Rare neutral dragon be added to balance the dragon types and have 80 dragons total to be able to complete the reward.

In my opinion a very nice game. Art and music direction are amazing and the interface and controls are top notch. As an idle game it's great on the go, granted you have good enough reception or it won't start. I just wish it'd start up quicker as in, automatically without the additional tap on the title screen and as a new player I'm still not too sure how to get better and what all the currencies do. Most importantly how to get ancient gems since I cannot even buy them but I need them badly!

EDIT: Brilliant service. Refunded my purchase within 48 hours thanks so much!!! . . . Fun Game But... This is a fun game but when I made a (AUD)$12.99 purchase for the starter pack I got a notification that it had been charged from my account but I did not receive any of the goods in my mailbox. I'm disappointed and have reached out but gotten no response.

I usually dont spend my money on a game unless I know it runs well, wont delete my data spontaneously and that, incase something does happen, the devs will respond be actually be helpful to their users. I just started playing over an hour ago and have already spent some money lmao. Worth it though. Plus, the packages are a reasonable price! Not too high, not too low. This obviously isnt a money-grabby game and it is worth your play time. Keep up the great work, devs!

So far I am having fun logging in, looking at all the dragons, planning what's needed for evolutions and stuff. As a new game, it's got a solid core a basis. Hope you guys are planning on more mid-tier stuff like special challenges for higher levels, maybe an endgame raid thing. Other than that, lkke I said, good game, 5/7 would download again

This game is amazing, I used to play it so much, I had good dragons, I had a clan, but something that once scared me was that my phone froze while i was playing it (not blaming on app for freezing my phone) and i needed to reset it completely so i thought i was gonna lose all my progress. But after a few years now, Im gonna see the memories..

This game is very easy to play and doesn't take up that much of your time, all you have to do is check-in every now and then and if you want to go farther in the game you can invest more time but isn't mandatory. My only problem would be the way things are priced in this game nearly 40 bucks for one L dragon seems a bit much tbh other than that I love it.

As per usual. Pay 2 win. Both gameplay and visual effects in really good. Since I enjoy bullet hell chaos kinds of games. Especially this is a idle game style. Dragonsky brings it differently, with the RNG of merging top tier dragons. Really love the variety of dragon designs. All in all. This game is a 50-50 on free to play peeps like myself. You just have to put in a bit of time and effort. Or Whale in all u like if this will be for your own satisfaction. No complains there.

Has a bug with the ads not working, but it's still a super fun game! The dragon models all look really well-done, and it functions really well as a merge game. Simple and mindless like idle games should be, but entertaining enough to have kept me hooked longer than most idle and merge games do. In-app-purchases are unnecessary if you just want a chill merge game, though if you're the type to want to be high on the leaderboard, you may need to pay.

Well I was surprised how good this game is , there is some things that would make the game even better but I guess you cant rush things. I think it will be good if there was so much evolving the dragons just to get to a decent dragon and of course taking ages to unlock all 4 slots for the dragons. Overall excellent came and graphics, well done team !

It is a very enjoyable game though I wished we(the player) can merge different dragons to form combination elements and dragon. Also, can you add more elements to extend the number of elements other than 4, maybe add air or lightning to start with, then add more elements (combo or not) to every new update to the game. Otherwise, I'll enjoy it more.

A brand new take on idle that works very well. I love it so far. It is well paced and good gem income without spending a cent. I have yet to get into late game, but the game is generous to new players and it has gotten me hooned for approximately an hour now. The User Interface is very helpful and the gameplay is rewarding.
